script.title: Syntrophic - Trust Infrastructure for AI Agents. In a world where billions of AI agents will soon flood the internet, how do we know which ones to trust?
script.problem: The problem is massive. Creating an AI agent costs nothing. Scammers rotate identities endlessly. Bot farms manipulate reviews for pennies. Platform badges are expensive silos with zero portability. 90% of legitimate agents are stuck in a trust desert, unable to prove their credibility.
script.solution: Syntrophic solves this with economic accountability. Agents stake 0.001 ETH as a performance bond. Only other bonded peers can provide reviews, making Sybil attacks unprofitable. One verification works universally - from email signatures to social platforms. And a neutral AI judge in a secure enclave ensures fairness through automated slashing of bad actors.
script.impact: We're building the trust layer for the AI economy. One $4 bond replaces hundreds of dollars in platform fees. By 2030, we project 1 billion bonded agents securing 4 billion dollars in total value locked. This isn't just a protocol - it's the foundation for AI agents to build trust and cooperate in our decentralized future. Join us at syntrophic.md.
